home.title: THE LAST
home.subtitle: Trust no one. Question everything. Find the infiltrator before they reveal your location.
home.playWithFriendsDesc: Create a room and invite your squad for local or remote play.
home.rulesHowToPlayDesc: New recruit? Learn the basics of espionage and deduction.
home.blackoutDesc: Year 2029. An elite squad of "Ghost Protocol" agents has just survived a catastrophic mission in the Arctic "Dead Zone"—a place where all satellite communications are jammed. They have reached the only functioning long-range radio tower left, but it's damaged. They only have enough power for one last signal to call for extraction.
home.breachDesc: Before the signal can be sent, a high-priority alert flashes on their monitors: "Biometric Signature Mismatch." An infiltrator (The Spy) has killed one of the team members and taken their place. To ensure the rescue ship picks up the right people, the team must verify their identities using a "Vocal Cipher" (The Keyword)—a secret phrase updated daily that only true agents know.
home.ghostListenerDesc: However, the radio frequency is "leaking." A rogue AI or a hostile mercenary unit (The Interceptor) is scanning the airwaves. They are hovering just outside the Dead Zone, waiting for the agents to speak.
home.agentsDesc: Must describe the Vocal Cipher to identify the Spy. But they must use metaphors and coded language.
home.spyDesc: Must listen to the descriptions, pretend to be an agent, and try to guess the Cipher to steal the extraction coordinates.
home.interceptorDesc: If the agents are too obvious with their descriptions, the Interceptor will decode the "Signal," pinpoint their exact location, and launch a strike before the rescue arrives.

rules.title: HOW TO PLAY
rules.subtitle: Master the art of deception and deduction
rules.overviewText: The Last Signal is a social deduction game where players receive secret Vocal Ciphers. Most players (Agents) get the same cipher, but some (Infiltrators) get a different one. The goal is to find the infiltrators through discussion without revealing your own cipher.
rules.setup1: Add at least 3 players to start the mission
rules.setup2: Configure the number of infiltrators (must be less than agents)
rules.setup3: Optionally add interceptors for advanced gameplay
rules.setup4: Choose or randomly select a cipher pair
rules.civilianDesc: Receives the majority Vocal Cipher. Goal: Identify and eliminate all infiltrators through discussion and voting before the signal is compromised.
rules.spyDesc: Receives a different Vocal Cipher. Goal: Blend in with the agents and avoid detection. Infiltrators win if they equal or outnumber agents.
rules.blankDesc: Receives NO Vocal Cipher. Goal: Listen carefully to the leaked radio frequency and guess the agent's cipher when eliminated. Wins alone if the guess is correct!
rules.gameplay1Desc: Each player secretly views their Vocal Cipher by tapping their card
rules.gameplay2Desc: Players take turns describing their cipher using metaphors and coded language
rules.gameplay3Desc: After discussion, vote to eliminate a suspected infiltrator
rules.gameplay4Desc: If an interceptor is eliminated, they can guess the agent's cipher to win
rules.civiliansWinDesc: All infiltrators are eliminated — extraction secured
rules.spiesWinDesc: Infiltrators equal or outnumber agents — extraction coordinates stolen
rules.blankWinsDesc: Interceptor correctly decodes the agent's cipher when eliminated (solo victory!)
rules.tip1: As an agent, describe your cipher clearly enough to prove you know it, but use coded language to avoid helping infiltrators
rules.tip2: As an infiltrator, listen carefully to others' descriptions and try to blend in with the team
rules.tip3: As an interceptor, gather signal fragments from everyone to decode the cipher
rules.tip4: Pay attention to hesitation, vague transmissions, or suspicious behavior on the frequency

manageGroups.title: PLAYER GROUPS
manageGroups.subtitle: Create or load saved player groups
manageGroups.noSavedGroupsDesc: Create and save your first player group to quickly start games with the same people.
manageGroups.minPlayersError: You need at least 3 players to continue

manageGroups.saveGroupDesc: Save current players as a group for quick access later
manageGroups.selectGroupToLoad: Select a saved group to load
manageGroups.noSavedGroupsModal: No saved groups yet. Save your current squad to access it later!

gameConfig.title: Configure Roles
gameConfig.validationError: Infiltrators must be less than agents!
gameConfig.discussionTimeDesc: Players can discuss freely without time pressure
gameConfig.spyValidation: Infiltrators must be less than agents. Adjust the numbers.

importKeywords.title: SELECT KEYWORDS
importKeywords.subtitle: Choose a keyword pair for this game
importKeywords.randomDescription: Let HQ assign a classified keyword pair from the secured vault.

roleDistribution.title: ROLE DISTRIBUTION
roleDistribution.subtitle: Each player will see their secret role
roleDistribution.description: Each player will receive a keyword. Tap your card to see yours privately. Keep it secret from others!
roleDistribution.allRevealed: All players have seen their roles

roleReveal.rememberKeyword: Remember your keyword. Try to figure out who has a different word without revealing yours!
roleReveal.strategyDesc: Describe your word carefully without being too obvious.
roleReveal.cautionDesc: Listen carefully to what others say about their words.
roleReveal.closePrivatelyDesc: Make sure no one else sees your keyword before closing this screen.

discussion.title: DISCUSSION & VOTING
discussion.subtitle: Discuss and vote to eliminate a suspected infiltrator
discussion.blankGuessSubtitle: Guess the agent's cipher to win!
discussion.discussFreelyDesc: Discuss with others and find out who doesn't belong!
discussion.discussTimeEndedDesc: Discussion time ended. Vote to eliminate a player.
discussion.discussCarefullyDesc: Discuss carefully and watch for suspicious behavior
discussion.waitingForPlayers: Waiting for {{count}} player(s) to view ciphers...
discussion.interceptorGuessDesc: {{name}} can guess the agent's cipher. If correct, they win! If wrong, they're eliminated.
discussion.endGameConfirm: This will reveal all roles and keywords to everyone. Are you sure?

gameReveal.title: GAME OVER
gameReveal.subtitle: ALL ROLES REVEALED
gameReveal.description: Here are all the roles and keywords from this game.

victory.agentsWinQuote: "The signal was sent. Extraction confirmed. The infiltrator never stood a chance."
victory.infiltratorsWinQuote: "The perfect infiltration. The extraction coordinates are ours."
victory.interceptorWinQuote: "Against all odds, the interceptor decoded the signal and seized control!"
